articles.headline: (PHOTO) Elon Musk Tours Optimus Production Line in Fremont as Tesla Advances Humanoid Robot Development
articles.summary: Elon Musk's recent visit to Tesla's Fremont factory showcased progress on the Optimus humanoid robot, emphasising its potential to transform manufacturing and service industries through advanced AI and robotics.
